zh.lifeSummary: 當Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt於1145年出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布達皮時，她的父親Guy Ier de Dampierre54歲，母親Helvide de Baudemont41歲。她於1175年與Geoffroi de Joinville IV結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1195年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt于1145年出生在法国德 艾斯特奧布達皮时，她的父亲Guy Ier de Dampierre54岁，母亲Helvide de Baudemont41岁。她于1175年与Geoffroi de Joinville IV结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1195年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Helvis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of obscure derivation, made famous by the American rock singer Elvis Presley ( 1935–77 ). It may be a transferred use of a surname, or it may have been made up, but it was certainly not chosen for the singer in anticipation of a career in show business, for his father's name was Vernon Elvis Presley . A shadowy Irish St Elvis , of the 6th century, is also known as Elwyn, Elwin, Elian, and Allan.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt was born in 1145, in Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, her father, Guy Ier de Dampierre, was 54 and her mother, Helvide de Baudemont, was 41. She married Geoffroi de Joinville IV in 1175. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1195, in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt est née en 1145, à Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Guy Ier de Dampierre, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Helvide de Baudemont, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroi de Joinville IV en 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1195, à Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt 1145 in Dampierre, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy Ier de Dampierre 54 und ihre Mutter Helvide de Baudemont 41. Sie hat 1175 Geoffroi de Joinville IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1195 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt è nata il nel 1145 nel Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Guy Ier de Dampierre, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Helvide de Baudemont, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Geoffroi de Joinville IV nel 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1195, nel Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourtが1145年にフランスグランド エストアウベダンパエアで生まれた時，父Guy Ier de Dampierreは54歳，母Helvide de Baudemontは41歳であった。1175年にGeoffroi de Joinville IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1195年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt(이)가 1145년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 댐피르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy Ier de Dampierre(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helvide de Baudemont(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1175년 Geoffroi de Joinville IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1195년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 캄브라이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt nasceu em 1145, em Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Guy Ier de Dampierre, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Helvide de Baudemont, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroi de Joinville IV em 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1195, em Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt родилась в 1145 г. в местности дампьирр, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy Ier de Dampierre было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Helvide de Baudemont, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroi de Joinville IV в 1175 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1195 г. в местности камбреи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

sm.from 1175 to 1190: mai le 1175 e o'o I le 1190

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helvis or Helvide de Dampierre Dame de Maillei and de Remignicourt nació en 1145, en Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Guy Ier de Dampierre, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Helvide de Baudemont, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Geoffroi de Joinville IV en 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1195, en Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
